text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1
 
Pav Lucistnik wrote on 4-4-2007 10:23:
> Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port security/ca-roots, please take a look at
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=109609
>
> Do you approve/reject this patch?
I've checked the MD5 sums and the keys seem correct. The decision of
which certs to include in this port and which not is a decision
security@ should make, IMHO.

Greets,

Nils

- --
Those who desire to give up freedom in order to gain security, will
not have, nor do they deserve, either one.

~Benjamin Franklin (American Statesman, Scientist, Philosopher,
Printer, Writer and Inventor. 1706-1790)
